title: Senior Specialist - AI & Integra Engineer - AI Group
company_focus:
Blockchain research and development, DeFi, governance,
identity management
description:
Who are we?

IOG, is a technology company focused on Blockchain research
and development. We are renowned for our scientific approach
to blockchain development, emphasizing peer-reviewed
research and formal methods to ensure security, scalability,
and sustainability. Our projects include decentralized
finance (DeFi), governance, and identity management, aiming
to advance the capabilities and adoption of blockchain
technology globally.

We invest in the unknown, applying our curiosity and desire
for positive change to everything we do. By fueling
creativity, innovation, and progress within our teams, our
products and services are designed for people to be
fearless, to be changemakers.

What the role involves:

As the Senior Specialist, AI & Integra Engineering, you will
be a lead engineer and technical authority responsible for
the architectural design and implementation of our core AI
engine (Overmind) and our Viable Enterprise Operating System
(Integra). This role serves as a key technical pillar within
the engineering team, focused on translating strategic and
research-intensive AI concepts into robust, scalable, and
production-grade software.

As a senior individual contributor, this role drives
critical and complex engineering projects, shaping the
technical direction and architectural blueprint for the
platform. The focus is on building a resilient, high-quality
engineering foundation for ambitious AI and Integra
initiatives, ensuring systems are innovative, reliable, and
ready for both internal scale and commercial deployment.

Technical Design & Architectural Leadership

- Drive the end-to-end technical architecture for key
  components of the Integra and Overmind platforms, making
  critical decisions on frameworks, technologies, and
  infrastructure.
- Establish and champion best practices for software
  development, code quality, testing, and CI/CD, mentoring
  other engineers and setting a high technical bar.
- Ensure the technical roadmap is tightly aligned with the
  product strategy, collaborating with leadership to balance
  feature development with technical debt and platform
  health.
- Lead the technical design and implementation of complex
  systems, including data pipelines, model deployment
  infrastructure, agentic workflows, and API integrations.

Engineering Execution & Delivery

- Lead the execution of complex, high-impact engineering
  projects, delivering high-quality software in a timely
  manner.
- Operate with a high degree of autonomy to resolve
  significant technical challenges, unblock progress, and
  ensure project success.
- Implement and refine engineering processes that optimize for
  both speed and quality, fostering a culture of predictable
  delivery and technical excellence.
- Own the technical aspects of deploying, scaling, and
  maintaining our AI models and platforms in production
  environments.

Mentorship & Technical Influence

- Mentor and coach other engineers on the team, fostering
  their technical growth and sharing expertise in software
  engineering and AI systems.
- Act as a force multiplier, elevating the entire team's
  technical capabilities through code reviews, design
  discussions, and knowledge sharing.
- Influence the broader engineering culture by championing
  innovation, ownership, and pragmatic solutions to complex
  problems.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Act as a primary technical voice and subject matter expert
  in the AI & Integra team.
- Collaborate closely with the Senior Manager, AI & Integra
  Operations to align technical execution with project
  priorities and operational plans.
- Partner with the Senior Specialist, AI Strategy & Innovation
  to translate advanced AI research into feasible,
  engineered solutions.
- Work with the Senior Specialist, AI Solution Architecture to
  ensure the back-end architecture supports a world-class
  user experience and meets user needs.
- Serve as a key technical liaison to other engineering groups
  within IOG, ensuring seamless integration and
  architectural alignment.

Requirements

Who you are:

- Typically 8+ years of experience in software engineering,
  with a significant portion spent in a senior or
  architectural capacity on complex projects.
- Proven track record of designing, building, and delivering
  complex, data-intensive, and scalable software products
  from concept to production.
- Deep hands-on experience with the engineering challenges of
  AI/ML systems (e.g., MLOps, data infrastructure, model
  deployment, API design for AI services).
- Expertise with modern programming languages (e.g., Scala,
  Python) and cloud-native technologies (e.g., Kubernetes,
  Docker, AWS/Azure).
- Experience in building enterprise-grade SaaS platforms or
  internal operating systems is highly desirable.
- Expertise in Production-Grade Software Engineering: A master
  of building and maintaining complex, scalable, and
  reliable software systems. Deep knowledge of software
  architecture, design patterns, and modern development
  practices.
- AI/ML Systems Architecture: Proven ability to design and
  build the infrastructure required to support the full
  lifecycle of machine learning models, from data ingestion
  and training to deployment and monitoring.
- Technical Leadership & Vision: The ability to set a clear
  technical direction for complex projects, inspire
  technical excellence, and make pragmatic architectural
  decisions that balance short-term needs with long-term
  scalability.
- Mentorship & Influence: A track record of leveling up fellow
  engineers and influencing technical direction without
  formal authority.
- Pragmatic Problem-Solving: A hands-on expert who can dive
  deep into technical details to solve the most complex
  engineering challenges.
- Collaborative Execution: A strong partner to product,
  operations, and research leaders, skilled at translating
  business and user needs into technical requirements.

Benefits

- Remote work
- Laptop reimbursement
- New starter package to buy hardware essentials (headphones,
  monitor, etc)
- Learning & Development opportunities
- Competitive PTO

At IOG, we value diversity and always treat all employees
and job applicants based on merit, qualifications,
competence, and talent. We do not discriminate on the basis
of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual
orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or
disability status.
responsibilities: Drive end-to-end technical architecture for Integra and Overmind platforms, making decisions on frameworks, technologies, and infrastructure
Lead technical design and implementation of complex systems including data pipelines, model deployment infrastructure, agentic workflows, and API integrations
Establish and champion best practices for software development, code quality, testing, and CI/CD while mentoring other engineers
Own the technical aspects of deploying, scaling, and maintaining AI models and platforms in production environments
Collaborate with AI Strategy & Innovation and Solution Architecture teams to translate advanced AI research into engineered solutions
Lead execution of complex, high-impact engineering projects delivering high-quality software with operational autonomy
use_cases: Overmind AI engine - core AI platform for blockchain enterprise applications
Viable Enterprise Operating System (Integra) - internal operating system platform
Agentic workflows - AI agent systems for automated task execution
Model deployment infrastructure - systems for deploying and scaling machine learning models
Data pipelines - infrastructure for data ingestion and processing for ML systems
API integrations - connecting AI services with enterprise applications
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building and deploying AI models,
implementing agentic workflows, and owning the technical
aspects of model deployment infrastructure. The focus is on
hands-on engineering of AI systems (Overmind AI engine,
MLOps, model deployment) rather than just providing
supporting infrastructure or platforms for others.
